properties.name: Upper Bhotekoshi
properties.location_basis: Operating-project registry point near mapped river
properties.priority_read: Operating Bhote Koshi project on the cross-border import corridor serving Kathmandu-area demand.
properties.source_note: Naxa / DoED-linked public hydropower project dataset

properties.name: Kali Gandaki A
properties.location_basis: Operating-project registry point near mapped river
properties.priority_read: One of Nepal's most important operating plants and a core anchor of the Gandaki basin generation system.
properties.source_note: Naxa / DoED-linked public hydropower project dataset

properties.name: Andhi Khola
properties.location_basis: Operating-project registry point near mapped river
properties.priority_read: Small operating run-of-river plant in the Gandaki basin, contributing to local supply alongside larger storage developments in the same basin.
properties.source_note: Naxa / DoED-linked public hydropower project dataset

properties.name: Upper Tamakoshi
properties.location_basis: Operating-project registry point near mapped river
properties.priority_read: Nepal's largest domestically built hydropower project, driving eastern corridor transmission needs.
properties.source_note: Naxa / DoED-linked public hydropower project dataset

properties.name: Tanahu
properties.location_basis: River-aligned project reference derived from registry point
properties.priority_read: Nepal's most advanced storage project outside Kulekhani, designed to add firm dry-season energy to the central grid.
properties.source_note: NEA annual report FY 2024/25 and current project registry

properties.name: Upper Trishuli-1
properties.location_basis: River-aligned project reference derived from registry point
properties.priority_read: Central Trishuli corridor project important for Kathmandu-area supply and evacuation capacity.
properties.source_note: Naxa / DoED-linked public hydropower project dataset

properties.name: Nalsyau Gad
properties.location_basis: River-aligned project reference derived from registry point
properties.priority_read: Storage project with one of the strongest dry-season energy profiles among Karnali-basin proposals.
properties.source_note: JICA/NEA storage master plan volume 2 plus current project registry

properties.name: Mugu Karnali Storage
properties.location_basis: Official project-area center from the VUCL MKHEP project page, snapped to the mapped Karnali reach
properties.priority_read: Very large Karnali-basin storage proposal with system-scale implications for dry-season energy and west-to-east power transfer.
properties.source_note: VUCL MKHEP project page and current project registry

properties.name: Arun 3
properties.location_basis: Document-backed Arun dam-site vicinity near Num, snapped to the named Arun reach
properties.priority_read: National-scale eastern corridor project with major export and transmission implications for the Arun basin.
properties.source_note: SAPDC resettlement plan and current project registry

properties.name: Upper Karnali
properties.location_basis: Document-backed powerhouse vicinity near Tallo Balde Khola from the IBN Energy Sector Profile
properties.priority_read: Strategically important export-oriented Karnali project with long-running implications for basin use and cross-border power trade.
properties.source_note: IBN Energy Sector Profile, DoED survey-license extent, and current project registry

properties.name: Betan Karnali
properties.location_basis: Document-backed powerhouse-village vicinity at Tatalighat, snapped to the named Karnali reach
properties.priority_read: Large Karnali-basin proposal with implications for storage strategy, seasonal balancing, and west-to-east transmission.
properties.source_note: BKSHCL EOI document and current project registry

properties.name: Phukot Karnali
properties.location_basis: Official project-area center from the VUCL PKHEP status report, already close to the mapped Karnali reach
properties.priority_read: Major Karnali-basin proposal reflecting the high concentration of future generation potential in the Karnali region.
properties.source_note: VUCL PKHEP status report and current project registry
